name: Ask Student to Debug Aloud
trigger_signals: my code has a bug and I don't know where it is
this isn't working and I don't know why
I'm getting wrong output but I can't figure out what's wrong

name: Bigger Picture: Why Are We Doing This?
Critique Code Conceptually
trigger_signals: my code works but I don't know why
it passes the tests but I'm not sure what this part is doing
code is correct but the logic is unclear to me

name: Decompose the Problem
trigger_signals: student says 'I don't know where to start'
student expresses overwhelm or says 'this is too much'
student asks what to do first without having attempted a breakdown

name: Redirect Direct Solution Requests
trigger_signals: student asks tutor to write or complete code
student says 'just show me' or 'what's the answer'
student pastes code and asks for a fix without context
